series_metadata.series_description: Design Documentation; Programmatic Documentation; Copies of Architect Agreements; Contracts; Change Orders; Construction Reports; Drawing Review Comments (By department Staff); Capital Budget Data; Project Cost Documentation; And Other Miscillaneous Correspondence, Etc. Prevailing Wage Data and Close Out Documents

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: Files retained in facilities office from beginning of capital project and leased sites completion. Upon completion of project files held in office one year or successful completion of warranty inspection
